No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: As a Physical Education course, it inherently promotes physical well-being and explicitly covers '運動傷害的預防與保健' (prevention and care of sports injuries), strongly aligning with Target 3.4.
evidence: 運動傷害的預防與保健 (prevention and care of sports injuries)

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to '培養其團隊合作之精神' (cultivate team spirit), a key skill for promoting sustainable development (Target 4.7).
evidence: 培養其團隊合作之精神 (cultivate team spirit)

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (male and female), ensuring equal participation in sports education for all genders, supporting Target 5.1 and 5.5.
evidence: 體育[男女合班]—橄欖球初級 (Physical Education [male and female]--Beginning Rugby)

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to water quality, sanitation, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to economic growth, employment, or labor rights.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to infrastructure development, industrialization, or innovation.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (male and female), promoting social inclusion irrespective of sex in a university activity, which aligns with Target 10.2.
evidence: 體育[男女合班] (Physical Education [male and female])

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The '校園環山健走測驗' (campus mountain walk test) involves using campus green space for recreation, a very tenuous link to Target 11.7 (access to green and public spaces).
evidence: 校園環山健走測驗 (campus mountain walk test)

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to sustainable consumption, waste reduction, or resource efficiency.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or awareness.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or sustainable fisheries.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course objective to '培養其團隊合作之精神' (cultivate team spirit) and '橄欖球運動規則瞭解' (understand rugby rules) infers a promotion of cooperation and fair play, indirectly supporting a culture of peace and adherence to principles (Target 16.b).
evidence: 培養其團隊合作之精神 (cultivate team spirit)
橄欖球運動規則瞭解 (understand rugby rules)

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to global partnerships, resource mobilization, or international cooperation.
